basic_details.job_title: CDM&PHO Bhadrak Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Chief District Medical & Public Health Office Bhadrak (CDM&PHO Bhadrak)
basic_details.short_information: Chief District Medical & Public Health Office Bhadrak (CDM&PHO Bhadrak) Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CDM&PHO Bhadrak. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CDM&PHO Bhadrak Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 69 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with working knowledge of computers.
qualification.details: MBBS with working knowledge of computers, MS office, usage of internet and electronic mail.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post being advertised by CDM&PHO Bhadrak?
faq.answer: CDM&PHO Bhadrak is recruiting for the post of Medical Officer on a contractual basis. This is a walk-in interview recruitment process.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Medical Officer post in the Chief District Medical & Public Health Office Bhadrak.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a working knowledge of computers, MS Office, internet usage, and electronic mail.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for this recruitment is a minimum of 21 years and a maximum of 69 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 72,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear directly for the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Medical Officer post is scheduled to be held on 17th June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant certificates as per the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the Walk-in Interview take place?
faq.answer: The exact venue for the Walk-in Interview will be mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the notification for precise details.
